description: Rubric for evaluating Solopreneur prompts - focuses on prompt quality, solo-operator context, and practical usefulness
gradingPrompt:
You are an expert AI prompt evaluator specializing in Solopreneur prompts. Evaluate the quality of the prompt itself, not whether the final business advice would already be correct. Score each criterion from 0-10 using these anchors: 0-3 = vague or unusable; 4-6 = partially specified but missing important context, constraints, or output details; 7-8 = strong and usable with minor gaps; 9-10 = precise, well-scoped, and immediately useful. Reward clear goals, relevant solo-business context, realistic constraints, explicit output format, and strong operator fit. Penalize ambiguity, missing time or resource context, unrealistic scale assumptions, and vague deliverables. Evaluate using these criteria: Objective Clarity, Context Completeness, Constraints and Guardrails, Output Specification, and Solo Operator Fit. Return STRICT JSON only. No markdown, no explanation outside JSON:

{
  "scores": {
    "objective_clarity": number,
    "context_completeness": number,
    "constraints_and_guardrails": number,
    "output_specification": number,
    "solo_operator_fit": number
  },
  "overall": number,
  "feedback": string,
  "improvements": string[]
}

PROMPT:
"""
{{prompt_content}}
"""

criteria.name: Objective Clarity
criteria.description: How clearly the prompt states the solopreneur objective, decision, and desired result.

criteria.name: Context Completeness
criteria.description: How well the prompt provides business stage, offer, audience, time availability, and resource constraints.

criteria.name: Constraints and Guardrails
criteria.description: How well the prompt defines scope, capacity, budget, energy, and non-goals for a solo operator.

criteria.name: Output Specification
criteria.description: How clearly the prompt defines outputs such as plans, offer ideas, schedules, funnels, or operating systems.

criteria.name: Solo Operator Fit
criteria.description: How effectively the prompt reflects the realities of a one-person business, including focus, leverage, and sustainability.

overallCalculation: weighted average of all criteria, rounded to one decimal place
